title: AESL Wins ~Rs 2,800 Cr Transmission Project in Gujarat for Green Hydrogen/Ammonia Manufacturing
content: Adani Energy Solutions Ltd (AESL), Indiaâ€™s largest private transmission and distribution company, has secured a power transmission project in Gujarat to supply green electrons for Green Hydrogen and Green Ammonia manufacturing in Mundra. The Rs 2,800 crore project will be delivered in 36 months. The project involves upgrading the Navinal (Mundra) electrical substation with two 765/400kV transformers and constructing a 75 km, 765kV double-circuit line connecting it to the Bhuj substation. This will add 150 cKM of transmission lines and 3,000 MVA of transformation capacity to AESLâ€™s infrastructure, bringing its total to 25,928 cKM and 87,186 MVA, respectively.
author: Analysts Account
